calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2006 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2006 Continued To Oct-10-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Aug-22-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Nici Rodich.
Atty. Roger A. Dreyer, Esq. for Petitioner: Christine A. Fleckenstein, present as Guardian at litem for: Christopher R. Fleckenstein. Petitioner was sworn and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved. On the Personal Injury claim:
Settlement amount - $125,000
Atty. fees- $ 25,000.00
Costs - $ 25,832.00
A net balance of $99,168.00 to be used in purchasing annuity for the minor.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

On the wrongful death settlement:
Settlement amount - $100,000
Atty. fees- $ 20,000
Costs - $20,000
A net balance of $80,000 to be used in purchasing annuity for the minor. Order approving
compromise of claim is signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-06-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Sep-05-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2006 Vacated

Off Calendar May-03-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2006 Set For Trial On Jul-17-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jun-28-06 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 602
